Hoolheyak:Linger.NAME: Linger
Hoolheyak:Linger.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Look at the top !M! cards of your draw pile, NL Select up to !M! cards, Variable: NL Discard them ; NL Place them at the bottom of your draw pile. NL Draw !Hoolheyak:DRAW! cards.

Hoolheyak:Compose.NAME: Compose

EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: A card in your hand costs -3.
All cards in your hand cost -1.
Choose a card in your hand to cost -3.

Hoolheyak:Turbulence.NAME: Turbulence

Hoolheyak:Convection.NAME: Convection

Hoolheyak:Archive.NAME: Archive

At the end of combat, choose an additional Colorless card.

Hoolheyak:Coercion.NAME: Coercion
Hoolheyak:Coercion.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the target has Levitate, make them fall and gain [E].
Hoolheyak:Coercion.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the target has Levitate, make them fall and gain [E] [E].

Hoolheyak:MadWords.NAME: Mad Words of Erudition
Hoolheyak:MadWords.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, apply !Hoolheyak:LIFT! Lift. NL Play an additional !M! times.

Hoolheyak:CrossExperiment.NAME: Cross Experiment
Hoolheyak:CrossExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain !B! Block. NL When played, this card permanently gains Variable: NL + !M! damage ; NL + !M! Block.

Hoolheyak:Revision.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Exhaust a card in your hand, and randomly gain a card of the same type.
Hoolheyak:Revision.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Exhaust a card in your hand, and randomly gain a card of the same type. It costs 0 this turn.

Hoolheyak:Foreshadowing.NAME: Foreshadowing

Hoolheyak:Footnote.NAME: Footnote

Hoolheyak:Tamper.NAME: Tamper
Hoolheyak:Tamper.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If this card triggered Meander, play it an additional time.

Hoolheyak:ParameterCorrection.NAME: Parameter Correction
Hoolheyak:ParameterCorrection.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL At the end of your turn, up to !M! other cards in your hand Retain this turn. NL Whenever this effect triggers, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:LiteratureRetrieval.DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of 3 random colored cards to add to your hand.
Hoolheyak:LiteratureRetrieval.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of 3 random colored cards to add to your hand. NL This card costs 0 this turn.

Hoolheyak:MassOffset.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Apply X+1 Lift to all enemies, and gain X+1 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:FlyUp.NAME: Fly Up!
Hoolheyak:FlyUp.DESCRIPTION: Trigger X times Variable: NL Erudition ; NL Meander.
Hoolheyak:FlyUp.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Analysis. NL Trigger X+1 times Variable: NL Erudition ; NL Meander.

Hoolheyak:ColdEye.NAME: Cold Eye
Hoolheyak:ColdEye.DESCRIPTION: If the target took damage from you this turn, gain !M! Analysis ; otherwise, gain !B! Block.

Hoolheyak:InheritedEnd.NAME: Inherited End
Hoolheyak:InheritedEnd.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL This turn, whenever you alternate playing an Attack and a Skill card, gain [E] and draw 1 card.

Hoolheyak:Stargazing.NAME: Stargazing
Hoolheyak:Stargazing.DESCRIPTION: Look at the top !M! cards of your draw pile, NL Select up to !M! cards, Variable: NL Discard them ; NL Place them at the bottom of your draw pile.

Hoolheyak:RecursiveExperiment.NAME: Recursive Experiment
Hoolheyak:RecursiveExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Start an experiment for 1 Energy. NL Variable: NL Terminate this experiment ; NL Play 1 random card and permanently remove it from your deck. At the end of combat, gain an additional card reward of the same type. Then start another experiment.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Play 1 random card and permanently remove it from your deck. At the end of combat, gain an additional card reward of the same type. Then start another experiment.

Hoolheyak:RedundantExperiment.NAME: Redundant Experiment
Hoolheyak:RedundantExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Choose !M! cards in your hand, Variable: NL This turn, the selected cards are considered played when discarded. (End of turn discard triggers this too!) ; NL Discard them, and draw that many cards.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Make them considered played when discarded
Discard them, and draw that many cards.

Hoolheyak:BygoneWings.NAME: Bygone Wings

Hoolheyak:InheritedMemories.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you trigger Meander or Erudition, gain 1 Analysis.
Hoolheyak:InheritedMemories.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Whenever you trigger Meander or Erudition, gain 1 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:ForbiddenKnowledge.NAME: Forbidden Knowledge

When triggering Meander, deal 5 damage to all enemies.

Hoolheyak:AncientCovenant.NAME: Ancient Covenant

Hoolheyak:Wardrobe.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play 1 card of a different color, randomly add *1 card of this color to your hand and Exhaust it, and its cost becomes *0 this combat.

Hoolheyak:OmniscientHorizon.NAME: Omniscient Horizon
Hoolheyak:OmniscientHorizon.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an enemy enters Levitate, draw 2 cards and gain [E] [E].

Hoolheyak:SerpentBloodline.NAME: Serpent Bloodline
Hoolheyak:SerpentBloodline.DESCRIPTION: Gain Ritual equal to your Analysis. Then, whenever you gain Analysis, gain that much Ritual. NL At the start of your turn, lose [E].

Hoolheyak:DistantLight.NAME: Distant Light
Hoolheyak:DistantLight.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, if the Attack damage you dealt this turn is less than 6, trigger Meander and Erudition.

Hoolheyak:CorrectedVariable.NAME: Corrected Variable
Hoolheyak:CorrectedVariable.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you draw a Status card, gain 1 Erudition. NL Whenever you draw a Curse card, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:ComplementaryExperiment.NAME: Complementary Experiment
Hoolheyak:ComplementaryExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain !M! Block.

Hoolheyak:KukulkanLegacy.NAME: Kukulkan's Legacy
Hoolheyak:KukulkanLegacy.DESCRIPTION: Increase your Erudition and Meander limits by !M!. But damage dealt and Lift applied are doubled.

Hoolheyak:TwinExperiment.NAME: Twin Experiment
Hoolheyak:TwinExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to two random enemies 2 times. NL If you hit two different enemies, apply an additional *2 times !D! damage to Variable: NL the enemy with more HP remaining ; NL the enemy with less HP remaining.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Apply the additional damage to the enemy with *more HP remaining
Apply the additional damage to the enemy with *less HP remaining

Hoolheyak:KnockInExperiment.NAME: Knock-In Experiment
Hoolheyak:KnockInExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Variable: NL Spend [E], heal 3 HP ; NL Gain [E].

Hoolheyak:ConjunctionCard.NAME: Conjunction
Hoolheyak:ConjunctionCard.DESCRIPTION: Neutral Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Conjunction: Damage dealt by all characters increased by 50%.

Hoolheyak:QuincunxCard.NAME: Quincunx
Hoolheyak:QuincunxCard.DESCRIPTION: Neutral Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Quincunx: Your Skill cards provide Erudition, Attack cards provide Meander.

Hoolheyak:SextileCard.NAME: Sextile
Hoolheyak:SextileCard.DESCRIPTION: Harmonious Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Sextile: The stacks required to trigger your Erudition and Meander are reduced by 2, but you can no longer apply Lift.

Hoolheyak:TrineCard.NAME: Trine
Hoolheyak:TrineCard.DESCRIPTION: Harmonious Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Trine: At the start of your turn, gain [E] and draw 2 cards. Your Attack cards gain Exhaust.

Hoolheyak:SquareCard.NAME: Square
Hoolheyak:SquareCard.DESCRIPTION: Challenging Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Square: Whenever you play a card, lose 1 HP and apply 1 Lift to all enemies.

Hoolheyak:OppositionCard.NAME: Opposition
Hoolheyak:OppositionCard.DESCRIPTION: Challenging Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Opposition: You cannot gain Block. Enemies' Gravity is considered half of its original value.

Hoolheyak:ChimeraExperiment.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Play the top X+1 cards of your draw pile Variable: NL Attack cards ; NL Skill cards.

Hoolheyak:ContingencyPlan.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain [E]. NL Whenever Meander or Erudition is triggered, return this card from the discard pile to your hand.

Place 1 random Aspect into your discard pile, then immediately shuffle

Hoolheyak:TransitionalFlow.NAME: Transitional Flow
Hoolheyak:TransitionalFlow.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Play it an additional time.

Hoolheyak:Wake.NAME: Wake
Hoolheyak:Wake.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! Analysis. NL If the last card you played was a Skill card, play this card an additional time.

Hoolheyak:UniversalMapping.NAME: Universal Mapping

Hoolheyak:Divergence.NAME: Divergence
Hoolheyak:Divergence.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Consume all Lift from the target, for each stack consumed, gain !M! additional Block.

Hoolheyak:Convergence.NAME: Convergence
Hoolheyak:Convergence.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Gain additional Block equal to the sum of all enemies' Gravity (up to !M!).

Hoolheyak:CrossSearch.NAME: Cross Search
Hoolheyak:CrossSearch.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards, discard 1 card. NL If an Attack card is discarded, gain 1 Erudition ; NL If a Skill card is discarded, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:FactorialExperiment.NAME: Factorial Experiment

Hoolheyak:DiffEasy.DESCRIPTION: Difficulty suitable for familiarizing with mechanics. NL Meander stack limit decreased by *1. NL Some card values or effects adjusted.
